author: Jed Brown
releaseNotes:
v0.4.0    UX improvements and bug fix
          Configuration checklist on main page (✅/❌/⚠️ for each setting)
          Dynamic arming summary in Setup (explains effective arming condition)
          Enhanced status dashboard: arming context, time since last cycle, frequency info
          Actionable Why-not-running diagnostics with specific hints
          Test section collapsed by default; clear button + last test result displayed
          Time window page shows resolved today's window for sunrise/sunset offsets
          Fix: anchor lights no longer turned off during mode changes when app was not running
v0.3.3    Fix to ensure schedule maintains over multiple days, + option for notfications to be immediate after a session.
v0.3.2.2  Bug fixes and improvements
          Daily summary only sends if cycles > 0 and only schedules when armed
          Warning displayed if Hubitat timezone is not configured
          Fix to ensure lights turn off when app is disarmed
v0.3.2    Vacation reliability and arming fixes
          Parent/child architecture with Analyzer child
v0.3.1    Analyzer accuracy improvements
